title: Format a phone number with parentheses and hyphens
scenario: Given a phone number in the format XXXXXXXXXX, format it with parentheses and hyphens as XXX-XXX-XXXX.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the JavaScript code meets the specified constraints (uses string manipulation, under 50 characters).
Check if the JavaScript function correctly formats the phone number with parentheses and hyphens.
Assess if the JavaScript code is syntactically correct.
